TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Mike_Brown, title = Mike_Brown, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Mike_Brown} }

S.FORM: Mike Brown sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1963, ryax sa tay 19 nqu tay 7, Mike Brown, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Mike Brown sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1963, ryax sa tay 19 nqu tay 7, Mike Brown, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: mike βrown s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, mike βrown, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
